claims.summary: High fill shortens semantic persistence while high entropy earns bounded extra retention.
claims.disposition: Verified fill-shaped stale windows, entropy multiplier, context multiplier, and caps.

claims.summary: Distributed high-entropy content can remain sticky even when the fill-driven floor shortens.
claims.disposition: Verified explicit entropy/context persistence calculations and saturation guards.

claims.summary: Trace persistence should be compared while fill oscillates between 60% and 75%.
claims.disposition: Routed as a bounded replay/observation with no live stale-window change.

claims.summary: Making live decay directly viscosity- or density-gradient-aware changes sensory persistence behavior.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait.
